title: Menu demo mini-site
description: 20-page realistic demo with all four navigation menus wired: double-dropdown header with top-row utility links and a main-row Resources group, grouped footer columns with a standalone link and an external status link, nested mobile drawer, and bottom tabs with a segment child plus a More holder tab (first-child redirect).

en-GB.content: Welcome to the SelfHelp navigation demo.

translations.content: Welcome to the SelfHelp navigation demo.
